data.title: US stocks opened lower across the board for crypto stocks, with Solana (HSDT) falling 4.17%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.15%, the S&P 500 fell 0.33%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.50%. In the crypto sector, Bitmine fell 1.74%, SharpLink fell 2.95%, Coinbase fell 0.85%, Strategy (MSTR) fell 1.18%, Circle fell 2.46%, and Solana fell 4.17%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: India's US Treasury Bond Holdings Hit Five-Year Low in 2023
data.description: India has reduced its holdings of US Treasury bonds by $174 billion in 2023, representing a 26% decline from their peak and reaching a five-year low. According to NS3.AI, the Indian central bank is reallocating its reserves from US dollar assets to gold in an effort to bolster the weakening rupee. This strategy is part of a larger trend among BRICS nations to diversify their reserves away from US bonds and towards gold and commodities.

data.title: Kraken-backed SPAC KRAKacquisition Corp. completes $345 million IPO
data.description: KRAKacquisition Corp. announced the completion of its $345 million IPO and commencement of trading on Nasdaq. The offering comprised 34.5 million units at a price of $10 per unit. KRAKacquisition Corp. began trading on January 28 under the ticker symbol KRAQU. Each unit consists of one common stock and one-quarter redeemable warrants. The project, initiated by Kraken affiliates, Natural Capital, and Tribe Capital, aimed to pursue future mergers or acquisitions. No specific acquisition targets have yet been identified.

data.title: The Anatomy of a Self-Made Billionaire’s Mindset: How Gurhan Kiziloz Reached a $1.7B Net Worth
data.description:
There are many paths to wealth in the modern economy, but the one Gurhan Kiziloz took stands out for a simple reason: he built everything himself. By 2026, the founder of Nexus International and BlockDAG recorded a personal net worth of $1.7 billion, an outcome driven not by venture funding, speculative valuations, or market theatrics, but by ownership, operating profit, and global scale. His story offers a clearer view into what it now means to be a self-made billionaire in the 21st century, and how a founder’s philosophy can shape both outcomes and empires
source: https://dailycoin.com/the-anatomy-of-a-self-made-billionaires-mindset-how-gurhan-kiziloz-reached-a-1-7b-net-worth/?utm_source=cryptopanic&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Lido Launches stVaults Feature on Ethereum Mainnet with V3 Upgrade
data.description: Lido, an Ethereum staking platform, has introduced its stVaults feature on the mainnet as part of its V3 upgrade. According to NS3.AI, the stVaults feature, which underwent testing with key partners, provides modular smart contracts allowing institutions to tailor staking configurations. This development is designed to enhance regulatory compliance and operational control for institutional participants.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bostic Discusses Inflation and Employment Risks
data.description: Federal Reserve official Bostic has commented on the current state of inflation and employment risks. According to ChainCatcher, Bostic noted that these risks are now largely balanced, with the downside risks to employment significantly reduced compared to previous assessments. However, he highlighted that inflation progress has stalled over the past two years, necessitating continued vigilance from the Federal Reserve. Bostic expressed a desire to see clear evidence of inflation returning to the 2% target.Bostic believes there is no need for the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates at this time and advocates for a more patient approach regarding rate decisions. He also anticipates that the effects of certain tariff policies will persist until the first half of 2026.

data.title: 4Heal Technology Secures Pre-Seed Funding for Web3 Health AI Development
data.description: Web3 health AI infrastructure company 4Heal Technology has completed a multi-million dollar pre-seed funding round, valuing the company at $35 million. According to Foresight News, the funding was exclusively provided by Nasdaq-listed Aimei Health Technology II. The investment will primarily support the development of Web3 AI health agents, wearable decentralized physical infrastructure networks (DePIN), and a decentralized platform for the commercialization of de-identified health data.

data.title: U.S. Producer Price Index Rises More Than Expected in December
data.description: The U.S. Department of Labor has announced a 0.5% increase in the Producer Price Index (PPI) for December, surpassing the anticipated 0.2% rise. According to NS3.AI, the PPI is a significant indicator that often precedes changes in the Consumer Price Index (CPI), highlighting ongoing inflationary pressures. This development suggests that inflation may continue to be elevated in the near future, which could influence upcoming monetary policy decisions.

data.title: Michael Saylor: Kevin Warsh will become the first Federal Reserve Chairman to endorse Bitcoin.
data.description: Michael Saylor posted on the X platform that Kevin Warsh will become the first Federal Reserve Chairman to endorse Bitcoin.

data.title: BitMart listed on Infinex (INX)
data.description: According to an official announcement, BitMart will list Infinex (INX) on January 31st at 03:00 (UTC+8), with the INX/USDT trading pair available. Infinex is a new crypto application launched by Synthetix, providing access to various on-chain protocols, services, and applications. It employs a non-custodial architecture and uses a new security architecture centered on on-chain smart accounts and keys. Infinex was previously a decentralized perpetual protocol.

data.title: Ethereum Transaction Fees Hit Their Lowest Level in 9 yrs. Why It Matters
data.description:
The average cost of sending a transaction over the Ethereum network dropped from a peak of $200 during the NFT boom of 2021/22 to $0. 14.
source: https://cryptonews.com/exclusives/ethereum-transaction-fees-hit-their-lowest-level-in-9-yrs-why-it-matters/

data.title: India Budget 2026 likely to prioritize crypto clarity over higher taxes
data.description:
India Budget 2026 may ease crypto taxes with TDS cuts and loss offsets as the industry seeks clarity, better liquidity, and reduced capital flight.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/india-budget-2026-to-prioritise-crypto/

data.title: Fed's Bostic: The Fed does not need to cut interest rates now
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Bostic stated that current inflation and employment risks are largely balanced, and the downside risks to employment have significantly diminished compared to before. However, inflation progress has stalled over the past two years, and the Fed still needs to remain vigilant, hoping to see clear evidence of inflation returning to the 2% target. Bostic believes the Fed does not need to cut interest rates at present and should remain on the sidelines and adopt a more patient approach on interest rate issues. Furthermore, he expects the impact of some tariff policies to continue until the first half of 2026. Regarding Warsh, Bostic said he doesn't know him well, but has heard he is "quite thoughtful." (Jinshi)
